meanings.definition: determine the measurements of something or somebody, take measurements of
examples: Measure the length of the wall

meanings.definition: express as a number or measure or quantity

examples: This table surfaces measures 20inches by 36 inches

meanings.definition: evaluate or estimate the nature, quality, ability, extent, or significance of
examples: I will have the family jewels appraised by a professional
access all the factors when taking a risk

meanings.definition: having notes of fixed rhythmic value
unhurried and with care and dignity
examples: walking at the same measured pace
